_meta.source: SCHEDULE -EPC BOROUGE.xlsx (col K = CP / LF flag)
_meta.note: Update forecast_finish and variance_days after each schedule upload

activities.name: FG Compressor — Delivery
activities.description: Feed Gas Compressor full package delivery to site. Worst slip on CP at +111 days. Root cause: manufacturing delays and late PO placement. Drives all downstream construction activities.
activities.notes: Single biggest CP driver. Vendor must be formally notified.

activities.name: Feed Gas Compressor (Baseplate, Gear, Gas Seal)
activities.description: FG Compressor baseplate, gearbox and gas seal sub-components. Delivered as part of main compressor package. Slipped +111 days alongside main delivery.

activities.name: FG Foundation Check & Dimensional Examination
activities.description: Dimensional survey and acceptance check of FG Compressor concrete foundation. Duration compressed from 16d to 7d in recovery plan. Float improved from -7d (Feb) to +15d (Apr) through compression strategy.
activities.notes: Float improvement: Feb -7d → Apr +15d. Duration compressed 16d→7d.

activities.name: Installation of FG Compressor (Setting, Leveling)
activities.description: Setting and precision leveling of FG Compressor on its foundation. Critical alignment activity — tolerance ±0.05mm. No duration compression applied; requires full time.

activities.name: Setting of FG Compressor Base Plate
activities.description: Grouting and setting of compressor base plate. Duration compressed from 23d to 7d in recovery schedule.

activities.name: Compressors Area — Steel Structure Erection
activities.description: Complete steel structure erection in compressor area including all columns, beams, bracing and platforms. Large duration (114d) — no compression possible.

activities.name: Pipe Rack SR81 — Structure Installation
activities.description: Installation of Pipe Rack SR81 structural steelwork. Connected in sequence with compressor area steel.

activities.name: Piping Platforms
activities.description: Fabrication and installation of all piping and maintenance access platforms in the compressor area.

activities.name: Installation of Piping — FG Compressor
activities.description: All process and utility piping installation connected to the FG Compressor. Slight duration increase (51→52d) due to additional scope discovered.

activities.name: Installation of Piping — OG Compressor
activities.description: All process and utility piping installation connected to the OG Compressor. Parallel activity to C1007.

activities.name: E&I Installation — FG Compressor
activities.description: Electrical and instrumentation installation for the FG Compressor — cable pulling, terminations, junction boxes, local panels.

activities.name: E&I Installation — OG Compressor
activities.description: Electrical and instrumentation installation for the OG Compressor. Parallel with C1008.

activities.name: Punch List Close Out — FG Compressor
activities.description: Category A punch list clearance for FG Compressor area. Slight duration increase (10→11d).

activities.name: Punch List Close Out — OG Compressor
activities.description: Category A punch list clearance for OG Compressor area.

activities.name: Flushing / Airblowing and inspection of piping
activities.description: Oil flushing and air blowing of all compressor process piping. Slight duration reduction (17→16d) via procedure optimization.

activities.name: Lube Oil Flushing
activities.description: Lube oil flushing of compressor and gearbox lube oil systems. Required before mechanical run.

activities.name: Final compressor / driver alignment
activities.description: Final precision alignment of compressor, gearbox and driver (motor/turbine). Vendor rep required on site.
activities.notes: Vendor representative required — schedule visit accordingly

activities.name: Pre-commissioning punchlist clearing
activities.description: Final pre-commissioning punch list clearing before Mechanical Completion certificate. Gate activity for MC milestone.

activities.name: Mechanical Completion (MC)
activities.description: Mechanical Completion milestone — all equipment installed, piping hydrotested, E&I loop-checked, punch list Category A cleared. Baseline 20 Jan 2027 slipped to 23 Mar 2027 (+62d).
activities.notes: All 62-day CP activities cascade to this milestone

activities.name: Ready for Start-up (RFSU)
activities.description: Ready for Start-up — commissioning activities complete, all systems ready for hydrocarbon introduction.

activities.name: Main Scope As-Built
activities.description: Preparation and issue of all as-built drawings for main process scope. Long duration (83d) — begins after MC.

activities.name: Provisional Acceptance Certificate (PAC)
activities.description: Provisional Acceptance Certificate — project handover to COMPANY after successful performance tests. Contract completion milestone.

activities.name: 144.F-Provisional Acceptance Certificate
activities.description: Commercial milestone PAC — triggers final payment and warranty period start. Aligned with A1-PM-PKM-0004.
activities.notes: Commercial / contractual counterpart to PAC milestone
